title: scutellaria somalensis
intro: Scutellaria somalensis, also known as Somali skullcap, is a plant species in the mint family that is native to Somalia and other parts of East Africa. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Scutellaria somalensis include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as its potential to help manage conditions such as fever and respiratory infections. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, which is said to be effective in alleviating symptoms of various ailments.
